meta.scope: Current PC roster; one record per agent ability slot (C/Q/E/X).

fieldSemantics.usesPerRound: Base/max simultaneous uses exposed by the current wiki; recharge, reclaim, and shared-pool exceptions are in notes.
fieldSemantics.cost: Credits for basic abilities or ultimate points for ultimates; null means no listed purchase cost.
fieldSemantics.spawnsActor: True when an independently observable persistent world object, zone, wall, projectile-controller, beacon, or deployable exists.
fieldSemantics.maxLifetimeSeconds: Maximum spawned-actor lifetime. Null means indefinite/until round end or destroyed when spawnsActor is true, and not applicable when false.
fieldSemantics.suppressionInteraction: disabled, destroyed, or unaffected; describes an already-deployed actor/source when the owner is suppressed.

abilities.notes: Consumes one shared 150-credit Star. Star persists until used/round end; Gravity Well is active 2 s. Suppression prevents activating placed Stars.
Consumes one shared 150-credit Star. Star persists until used/round end; Nova Pulse winds up for 1 s. Suppression prevents activation.
Up to five shared Stars may be bought. Nebula lasts 14.25 s; Dissipate smoke lasts 1 s. Stars can be remotely recalled with a 25 s recharge.
World-spanning wall lasts 21 s and is not a deployable device.
2.2 s windup followed by two damage ticks over about 0.6 s; source is committed once fired.
Transient flash projectile through terrain; about 0.5 s windup.
Rechargeable (60 s); transient seismic blast, not a retained world object.
Sequential terrain wave; no persistent destroyable source.
Indestructible beacon field lasts 12 s; RapidFire buff lingers 4 s after leaving.
Incendiary ground zone lasts 7 s after impact.
Each smoke cloud lasts 19.25 s.
2 s windup and 3 s damaging strike; 5 s total spawned telegraph/zone.
Persists until triggered, recalled, destroyed, or round end. Recall/retrieval semantics vary by phase; slow field lasts 4 s. Suppression disables and reveals it.
Cost is per bullet; weapon equip/self state, no independent actor.
Anchor persists until recalled, destroyed, or round end. Teleport sequence is about 1.3 s; destroyed cooldown 30 s. Suppression disables the anchor.
Equips a five-round sniper; kill slow zone lasts 4 s but has no independently destroyable source.
Self buff lasts 10 s; requires essence from a recent damaged enemy death.
Transient projectile; resulting Decay lasts 5 s.
Smoke lasts 14 s while alive and 6 s when cast while dead; recharge is 40 s.
Self-revive state: up to 2 s intangible, then 10 s to earn a kill/damage assist.
Persists until triggered, recalled/picked up, destroyed, or round end; rearms after 2 s. Suppression disables and reveals it.
Placed cage persists until activated or round end; physically retrievable only during Buy Phase. Activated cylinder lasts 7.25 s. Suppression prevents activation.
Persists until recalled/picked up, destroyed, or round end. Recalled cooldown 15 s; destroyed cooldown 60 s. Suppression disables it.
Consumes an enemy corpse; two reveal pulses occur about 2 s and 4 s after cast.
Barrier lasts 30 s; nodes fortify after 3 s and are independently destroyable.
Persists until picked up, destroyed, triggered, or round end. Suppression disables and reveals it.
The net attaches to caught players until manually removed or round end; no fixed wiki lifetime. Recharge 60 s.
Nanowire path/source lasts up to 10 s; captured cocoon has 600 HP and cocoon debuff lasts 7 s.
Guided briefly, then autonomously chases marked/visible targets; lasts 2.5 s.
Indestructible knot/zone lasts 4.5 s; owner may drop it early while in flight.
Watcher is exposed for about 1.5 s and can be destroyed; recharge 60 s.
Traveling wave is transient; affected enemies remain marked/deafened/decayed for 8 s.
Current wiki supports Globules reclaim: 3 s active plus a reclaimable globule for 20 s (23 s combined maximum). Globule reclaim takes 1.5 s and refreshes after 20 s.
Normally active up to 5 s, then leaves a reclaimable globule for 20 s; spike plant/defuse task can extend active time.
Active about 1 s, then leaves a reclaimable globule for 20 s; recharge after reclaim is 20 s.
Controlled for up to 6 s, then globule remains 20 s. Can be cast at most twice after reclaim.
Current reworked ability creates a moving whirlpool; wiki lists about 0.6 s formation and a 2 s slow, but no clear total actor lifetime.
Reworked High Tide wall lasts 15 s after roughly 2 s formation.
Smoke lasts 19.25 s; optional shield has 680 HP. Recharge 30 s.
Forward-moving surge lasts up to 7 s if not stopped early by the caster.
Indestructible moving wall lasts about 4.6 s.
Transient molecular bolt; Vulnerable lasts 4 s.
Self Flow state lasts 12 s; energy orbs are short-lived kill prompts rather than persistent utility actors.
Duel arena lasts up to 13 s and is not destroyable.
Smoke cloud lasts 2.5 s.
Self movement impulse, roughly 0.6 s vertical boost.
Self dash can be primed for 7.5 s; charge refreshes after two kills.
Equipped weapon/self state, no persistent world actor; suppression forces ability weapon unequip.
Ground pulse field lasts about 4 s once deployed.
Transient flash grenade.
Knife embeds, winds up for about 1 s, then pulses automatically; 20 HP. Recharge 60 s.
Self overload lasts 12 s. Downed KAY/O body is a player-state target (850 stabilization HP, 15 s), not a spawned utility actor.
Placed grenade persists until activated, destroyed, picked up in Buy Phase, or round end; active swarm lasts 4 s. Suppression disables it.
Persists until triggered, remotely recalled, destroyed, or round end. Recall cooldown 20 s; suppression, owner death, and range deactivate it.
Current HP is 100; 125 HP is historical (reduced in v6.03). Persists until remotely recalled, destroyed, or round end. Recall cooldown 20 s; destroyed cooldown 60 s.
Device winds up for 13 s, has 200 HP, then applies Detain for 8 s. Suppressing Killjoy does not destroy or disable an already deployed Lockdown.

Device has 50 HP and emits three autonomous pulses. Approximate 5 s lifetime is derived from first pulse after 1 s and 0.5 pulses/s; wiki does not state a single total duration. Suppression interaction is not documented.
Self/ally buff lasts 8 s and refreshes on a kill.
Soundwave smoke lasts 16.75 s.
Area telegraph/windup lasts about 1.6 s; resulting Dazed effect lasts 8 s.
Parallel energy walls last 4 s.
Transient bolt produces two sequential concuss blasts.
Self sprint drains a 100 Energy pool at 16/s (up to about 6.25 s continuous). Slide charge refreshes after two kills.
Self weapon state has a minimum 20 s Energy budget and refreshes on kills. Suppression forces unequip while its timer/Energy drain continues.
Self teleport; no persistent actor.
Transient shadow projectile; Nearsight lasts about 2 s.
Smoke lasts 15 s; recharge 40 s.
Destination Shade exists for up to 4 s and can be destroyed or manually canceled. Wiki describes it as destroyable but provides no HP value. Suppression does not cancel the ultimate.
Flame wall lasts 8 s.
Fire pool lasts 3.25 s.
Transient flash projectile; charge refreshes after two kills.
Return marker lasts up to 10 s. Suppression applied to Phoenix carries through the return, but the marker itself remains active.
Autonomous bot lasts up to 5 s, has 60 HP, and locks onto nearby enemies.
Pack lasts up to 5 s, has 20 HP, and is manually detonated. Raze can activate an already-cast pack while suppressed.
Transient grenade/submunitions; charge refreshes after two kills.
Rocket launcher can be held for 10 s, but the fired rocket is transient; suppression forces ability weapon unequip.
Destroyable eye lasts 1.6 s and has 60 HP.
Shares two purchased charges with Dismiss and consumes a Soul Orb (orb opportunity lasts 3 s). Heal channel lasts about 3 s, or 2.5 s during Empress.
Shares two purchased charges with Devour and consumes a Soul Orb; self intangibility lasts about 1.5 s.
Current Empress has no fixed timer and lasts until death or round end; older 30 s references are stale. Suppression temporarily disables its benefits.
Wall lasts 40 s, has 400 HP per segment before fortifying to 600 HP after 2 s, and decays near expiry.
Slow field lasts 7 s.
Heal-over-time lasts 5 s; recharge 45 s.
About 3.3 s resurrection channel; revived player is not a utility actor.
Channeled heal uses a 100-point resource pool; cannot heal Skye herself.
Controlled animal lasts up to 6 s and has 80 HP; suppression removes owner control without destroying it.
Controlled hawk lasts up to 2 s and is indestructible; suppression prevents control/activation. Recharge is 60 s under the current v12.05 behavior.
Three autonomous Seekers last up to 15 s; each has 120 HP.
Controlled drone lasts 7 s and has 100 HP (125 HP is historical, reduced in v4.08). Suppression ends owner control but does not destroy it.
Transient bouncing projectile and explosion.
Embedded bolt scans autonomously for about 3.2 s and has 20 HP; recharge 60 s.
Up to three transient beams during a 6 s channel; suppression interrupts ability use.
Controlled drone lasts up to 6 s and has 42 HP; owner manually fires its pulse. Suppression removes control.
Transient sticky grenade; detonation/concuss sequence is about 0.9 s.
Targeted strike produces three damage ticks within about 1.6 s; no persistent destroyable device.
Map-targeted strike has about 3.08 s windup, then a traveling sequence of transient explosions.

Placed vortex has 20 HP and is reclaimable during Buy Phase. Wiki's 1.6 s duration describes the teleport sequence, not the pre-use placed lifetime; that lifetime and suppression behavior are not explicit.
Proximity trap has 20 HP and tethers for 4.5 s after triggering. Wiki does not explicitly state its maximum pre-trigger lifetime or suppression behavior.
Placed device has 20 HP and is manually activated for 9 s. Wiki does not yet document its suppression interaction.
Self state grants debuff immunity and regenerates ability damage at 40 HP/s. Wiki does not list a fixed duration or suppression interaction.
Acid field lasts 6.5 s.

Emitter persists until round end and is physically retrievable only during Buy Phase. Manual toggle uses shared Fuel: 100 Fuel lasts 12 s alone or 8.5 s with Toxic Screen; minimum on-time 2 s, reactivation cooldown 5 s, full refill 30 s. Suppression drops the active cloud but leaves the emitter.

Emitter line persists for the round. Manual toggle shares Fuel with Poison Cloud: 12 s alone or 8.5 s together; minimum on-time 2 s, reactivation cooldown 5 s, full refill 30 s. Suppression drops the active screen but does not destroy emitters.
Pit has no fixed duration while Viper remains inside; leaving starts an 8 s collapse timer, and Viper can manually disperse it early.
Invisible nest persists until activated, destroyed, Buy Phase pickup, or round end; active vines last 6 s. Suppression disables and reveals it.

Hidden proximity trap persists until triggered, destroyed, Buy Phase pickup, or round end; triggered indestructible wall lasts 6 s. Current suppression documentation omits Shear, so interaction is null.
Placed flash persists until used, recalled/picked up, destroyed, or round end; 20 HP. Recharge: 20 s after use/recall and 60 s after destruction. Suppression disables and reveals it.
Area windup/source lasts about 4.4 s; resulting Primary Jam lasts 8 s.
Transient cluster detonation (~0.6 s); Hinder lasts 3 s.
Self movement state for one long or two short dashes, about 0.45 s.
Return beacon lasts 8 s; Waylay manually returns after a 0.35-2 s windup. Charge refreshes after two kills; suppression prevents activation.
Afterimage/beam advances for about 1.6 s; Waylay's speed buff lasts 7 s and enemy Hinder lasts 6 s.
Inactive echo can remain until activated or round end; active clone lasts up to 10 s and has 150 HP. Suppression prevents activating a placed echo but does not destroy an active clone.
One charge under v12.05+; transient bouncing flash projectile.
Tether lasts 15 s, has 20 HP, and is manually used for teleport/fakeout. Charges refresh after two kills; suppression prevents activation.
Self phase state lasts up to 10 s; suppression interrupts/blocks ability use.
